sections.title: A: Use the word given in capitals to form a word
sections.instructions: Use the word given in capitals at the end of each line to form a word that fits in the gap.
sections.passage: I saw some badminton on TV and found it quite (1) ...... (INTEREST). ... so I thought I'd see if there was a club or (2) ...... (ASSOCIATE) in my area. I looked everywhere but, (3) ...... (FORTUNE), the nearest club was 80 kilometres away. So, without any (4) ...... (KNOW), I decided to form my own club. It was very hard in the beginning - I didn't have any (5) ...... (EQUIP). ... and I had to convince a few people that it was an (6) ...... (ENJOY) way to keep fit. I organised a small (7) ...... (COMPETE), which was a lot of fun ... Now we've got a full-time (8) ...... (TRAIN) ... ... and our (9) ...... (OPPOSE) come from all over the country. One of our members was even a bronze (10) ...... (MEDAL) in the national championship!

items.sentence: I refuse to put **H** up with people who cheat at games.
items.answer: H – up with people who cheat at games.

items.sentence: The current champion was knocked **C** out in the second round of the competition.
items.answer: C – out in the second round of the competition.

items.sentence: I used to love basketball, but I've gone **F** off team sports lately.
The trainer asked us to carry **E** on with the activity while he answered the phone.
items.answer: E – on with the activity while he answered the phone.

items.sentence: The organisers had to bring **G** the race forward by a week.
items.answer: G – the race forward by a week.

items.sentence: You should think about taking **A** up a martial art, to defend yourself.
items.answer: A – up a martial art, to defend yourself.

items.sentence: Although she was very young, Olivia took **B** to swimming as soon as she tried it.
items.answer: B – to swimming as soon as she tried it.

items.sentence: Rob had to pull **D** out of the race because of a last minute injury.
items.answer: D – out of the race because of a last minute injury.

sections.title: C: Complete each second sentence using the word given
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words in each gap.

items.sentence:
Our tennis match started at one o'clock and we were still playing at four. **been**
At four o'clock, we ...... three hours.

Terry never used to spend so much time playing on his computer. **use**
Terry ...... spend so much time playing on his computer.

Before we play, check all the cards are there. **certain**
Before we play, ...... all the cards are there.

Hang-gliding can be dangerous, but after a while you don't mind it. **used**
Hang-gliding can be dangerous, but after a while you ...... it.

I ran fifteen miles, and then my trainer told me to do fifty push-ups! **already**
When my trainer told me to do fifty push-ups, I ...... fifteen miles!

We wouldn't spend so much time indoors when I was young. **used**
We ...... so much time indoors when I was young.

I spend a lot of my time on my hobbies. **up**
My hobbies ...... a lot of my time.

I would rather play ludo than snakes and ladders. **prefer**
I ...... ludo rather than snakes and ladders.

I don't think it's likely that you'll win the competition. **chance**
I think there's ...... the competition.
'Why were you so tired yesterday?' 'Because I ...... all morning.'
It was the first time I ...... a live match.
'You live in a huge house, don't you?' 'Yes, but we .......'
I ...... the whole of War and Peace by the time I was seven years old.
Karate hurt my hands at first, but I finally ...... it in the end.
I ...... for the match to begin when suddenly a dog ran onto the pitch.
Before she retired, my grandma ...... go for a run every morning before work.
The ...... in the stadium all cheered the athletes.
I got a new baseball ...... yesterday.
After a hard match, United managed to ...... with City, 1-1.
In this game, the players ...... it in turns to throw the dice.
It's nice to win, but the important thing is to ...... your best.
Just ask them if you can play and I'm sure they'll let you .......
